use_cases: Landing page entry point with immersive 3D background for product showcases
Portfolio or creative agency hero section with interactive Spline 3D scenes
SaaS marketing pages requiring engaging visual hooks to capture attention
ai_summary: A full-viewport hero section featuring an embedded Spline 3D interactive scene with dark gradient overlays for text contrast. The component includes responsive positioning, a text content area with bold typography, and an optional screenshot showcase section. Optimized for creative product launches and SaaS landing pages requiring high visual engagement.
